title: Nexus ChapterSummary
description: Summary row for a work chapter in list responses (V1.65 P0). Lightweight — does not read outline/body files.

title.description: Human title if materialized by P0; otherwise clients may derive display text from slug/chapter number. V1.65 returns null.

outline_path.description: Relative path to outline file, or empty string if not initialized.

body_path.description: Relative path to body file, or empty string if not initialized. Body is read-only.
